languages.text: "Зачем ему со мной биться? Вы же говорите, что все уже решено".
"Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."
languages.original_text: "Зачем ему со мной биться? Вы же говорите, что все уже решено".

traits.locale_text: "Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."
"Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."
"Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."
"Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."
"Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."

languages.text: “他为什么要与我交手？你自己都说了，一切早已注定。”
languages.original_text: "Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."

traits.locale_text: “他为什么要与我交手？你自己都说了，一切早已注定。”

languages.text: "Neden benimle savaşmak istesin ki? Her şeyin zaten kararlaştırıldığını söylemiştin."
languages.original_text: "Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."

traits.locale_text: "Neden benimle savaşmak istesin ki? Her şeyin zaten kararlaştırıldığını söylemiştin."

languages.text: « Pourquoi veut-il se battre contre moi ? Vous avez dit vous-même que tout avait déjà été décidé. »
languages.original_text: "Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi veut-il se battre contre moi ? Vous avez dit vous-même que tout avait déjà été décidé. »

languages.text: «¿Por qué quiere luchar contra mí? Usted misma ha dicho que ya está todo decidido».
languages.original_text: "Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué quiere luchar contra mí? Usted misma ha dicho que ya está todo decidido».

languages.text: "Warum sollte er gegen mich kämpfen wollen? Ihr habt selbst gesagt, dass alles schon beschlossen ist."
languages.original_text: "Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."

traits.locale_text: "Warum sollte er gegen mich kämpfen wollen? Ihr habt selbst gesagt, dass alles schon beschlossen ist."

languages.text: 「なぜ彼は私と戦うことを望むのか？あなたが言ったように、すでにすべてが決まっているではないか。」
languages.original_text: "Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ彼は私と戦うことを望むのか？あなたが言ったように、すでにすべてが決まっているではないか。」
